text: Tempat yg sangat cocok untuk kembali ke alam.. harga terjangkau di tipe cemara dengan kapasitas 6 orang dan dapat sarapan buffet
english_translation: A very suitable place to return to nature.. affordable price for the cemara type with a capacity of 6 people and includes buffet breakfast
summary: This nature destination offers affordable group accommodation for up to six people, with an included buffet breakfast.

text: Ini lokasi ngemping paling deket dari wilayah cimahi, tempatnya adem nyaman, asri, hutan pinus nya lebat, spot fotonya banyak, air terjunnya seger bisa dipake mandi atau sekedar maen air, untuk prewed juga bagus
english_translation: This is the closest camping location to the Cimahi area, the place is cool, comfortable, beautiful, the pine forest is dense, there are many photo spots, the waterfall is refreshing and can be used for bathing or just playing in the water, it's also good for pre-weddings
summary: Conveniently located near the Cimahi area, this campsite features a dense pine forest and a waterfall suitable for bathing and water play. The site offers numerous photo spots, making it a popular location for activities like camping and pre-wedding photoshoots.

text: Gunung putri tempat yg indah untuk menikmati view kota dari tempat ketinggian. Jarak dari tempat parkir mobil ke puncak kira2 satu kilometer dengan elevasi 100. Ada warung kopi n indomie serta kamar mandi di dekat tempat parkir mobil. Nyaman dikunjungi saat sunrise n sunset
english_translation: Gunung Putri is a beautiful place to enjoy city views from a high vantage point. The distance from the car park to the summit is approximately one kilometer with an elevation of 100 meters. There are coffee and Indomie stalls, as well as restrooms near the car park. It's a comfortable place to visit during sunrise and sunset.
summary: Gunung Putri offers scenic city views, particularly at sunrise and sunset, from a summit accessible via a one-kilometer walk with a 100-meter elevation gain from the car park. Basic facilities, including food stalls and restrooms, are available near the parking area.

text: Salah satu wisata alam yang menjadi andalan kota kembang ini cukup ramai dikunjungi wisatawan. Tersedia shuttle dari parkiran bawah menuju puncak. Atau yg membawa mobil pribadi bisa langsung parkir di puncak.
english_translation: One of the natural attractions that is the mainstay of the flower city is quite crowded with tourists. A shuttle is available from the lower parking area to the summit. Or those who bring their private car can park directly at the summit.
summary: This popular natural attraction offers convenient access to its summit, providing a shuttle service from a lower parking area and also allowing visitors to drive private vehicles directly to a parking lot at the top.

text:
Ma syaa Allah... takjub akan kebesaran Ciptaan Allah SWT. Skrg Masuknya harus pake scan vaksin.
Tiket 30.000 hari libur
tiket mobil 35.000
parkir 5.000
Alhamdulillah rapih bersih nyaman, para pedagang juga ramah² bs minta tolong juga untuk potoin pengunjung.
Seru banget .... enjoy.
👍👍
english_translation:
Ma syaa Allah... amazed by the greatness of Allah SWT's Creation. Now entry requires a vaccination scan.
Ticket 30,000 on holidays
Car ticket 35,000
Parking 5,000
Alhamdulillah, neat, clean, comfortable, the vendors are also friendly, they can also be asked for help to take photos of visitors.
So much fun.... enjoy.
👍👍
summary: Access to this well-maintained and comfortable attraction requires a vaccination scan. The site provides parking and features friendly vendors who may assist with taking photos. Visitors should be aware of specific fees for holiday admission, vehicles, and parking.

text: HTM 30rb/orang (usia 2 tahun ke atas diihitung tiket).. lumayan banyak tempat baru, sayangnya mayoritas harus bayar lagi klo masuk. Tempat sholat pria dan wanita sudah dipisah, sayangnya tempat wudhu masih jadi 1. Sebaiknya pengunjung kesini dilarang merokok.
english_translation: HTM 30k/person (ages 2 and up are charged for a ticket).. quite a lot of new places, unfortunately, the majority require additional payment for entry. The prayer areas for men and women are separated, unfortunately, the ablution areas are still combined. Visitors here should preferably be prohibited from smoking.
summary: This attraction charges an entrance fee for visitors aged two and older, with most new activities requiring additional payments. The site provides gender-separated prayer rooms, but their ablution facilities are shared, and the reviewer observed that smoking is permitted on the premises.

text: sayang curug dan sungainya banyak sampah.. ga seindah yang di bayangkan
english_translation:
sayang curug dan sungainya banyak sampah.. ga seindah yang di bayangkan
It's a shame the waterfalls and rivers are full of trash.. not as beautiful as imagined
summary: This attraction, featuring waterfalls and rivers, is reported to have a significant trash problem, which detracts from its natural beauty and the overall visitor experience.

text: Nikmati semua pemandangan ini di camp ciwangun indah... Direkomendasikan untuk hiking atau outing keluarga
english_translation: Enjoy all these sights at the beautiful Camp Ciwangun... Recommended for hiking or family outings
summary: Camp Ciwangun is a scenic destination suitable for family outings, offering activities such as hiking and sightseeing.

text: Waktu tahun 2015 kesana masih rame ya, tahun 2021 balik kesana sepi, yang dagang di airnya juga sedikit.. tapi banyak kenangan lah disana... tetep top lah semoga lekas pulih dan kembali rame 🙏🏻 …
english_translation: Back in 2015 when I went there, it was still crowded. In 2021, I went back and it was quiet, and there were few vendors on the water... but there are many memories there... still top-notch. I hope it recovers quickly and becomes crowded again 🙏🏻…
summary: This tourist attraction is currently quiet with low visitor traffic, a significant change from its previously crowded state. This has impacted activities, as there has been a noticeable reduction in the number of water-based vendors.

text: Seru nih bisa ajak anak2 main ke floating market, khusunya ke kota mini...disini anak2 bisa latihan profesi..ada jadi chef, suster, pemadam kebakaran, polisi, dekor kue, salon dll, nah kalau utk chef atau yg profesinya bikin2 gtu..nanti hasil karyanya boleh dibawa, yg pasti anak2 excited bgt...emaknya juga😅 …
english_translation: It's exciting to bring the kids to play at the floating market, especially to the mini town... here the kids can practice professions... there's being a chef, nurse, firefighter, police officer, cake decorator, salon, etc. For chefs or professions that involve making things, the results of their work can be taken home. The kids are definitely very excited... and so are the moms 😅...
summary: This family-friendly floating market contains a "mini town" facility where children can participate in professional role-playing activities, such as being a chef, nurse, or firefighter. A key feature is that children can take home the items they create in certain professions.

text: Tempat wisata keluarga yang indah, asri, sejuk, dan rindang. Lokasi yang luas, bisa digunakan untuk kemping, sekedar jalan-jalan menikmati suasana hutan, flying fox, berfoto. Bagi yang ingin melaksanakan pernikahan di alam terbuka tempat ini sangat representatif.
english_translation: A beautiful, natural, cool, and shady family tourist destination. The spacious location can be used for camping, simply strolling to enjoy the forest atmosphere, flying fox, and taking photos. For those who wish to hold weddings in the open air, this place is very representative.
summary: This spacious, family-friendly natural site offers facilities for camping and outdoor weddings. Visitors can enjoy activities such as strolling through the forest, a flying fox, and photography.

text: Datang ke sini di weekday enak banget ya bisa bebas foto2 tanpa ada back ground orang banyak. Viewnya bagus2, semua lokasi bikin kita pgn foto2. Ada mbak2 yg bisa ambilin fotonya, jadi dia tau lokasi foto yg bagus2. Skr bayar 1 harga bisa masuk kesemua tempat spt rainbow garden, kota mini dll. Puas deh keliling2 disini
english_translation: Coming here on a weekday is really nice, you can take photos freely without a lot of people in the background. The views are beautiful, every spot makes you want to take pictures. There are ladies who can take your photos, so they know the best photo locations. Now for one price, you can enter all the places like Rainbow Garden, Kota Mini, etc. I'm satisfied after wandering around here.
summary: This attraction, best visited on a weekday to avoid crowds, offers access to multiple areas like a Rainbow Garden and Kota Mini with a single ticket. The site is highly scenic, making photography a key activity, and offers a photo-taking service with staff who know the best locations.

text: Udh lama gak k kebun begonia,hr ni ajak kluarga makin kerennnnn tempatnya, ....sayangnya bunga yg mau dibeli ternyata hbis. Makin bnyak jenis bunga. Harga bunga jg gak mahal lho kalau bli di situ. Tq
english_translation: Haven't been to the begonia garden in a long time, today I brought the family, the place is even cooler.... unfortunately, the flowers I wanted to buy were sold out. More and more types of flowers. The flowers are also not expensive if you buy them there. Thanks
summary: The begonia garden is a family-friendly attraction with an expanding variety of flowers. It offers affordable plants for purchase on-site, though popular selections may sell out.

text: Jajan di atas perahu..ada banyak wahana dsini. Tiket masuk 30rb per orang. Masuk arena bermain anak2 klo mau masuk semua bayar 98rb. Playground,flying fox,kereta mini,becak. Klo untuk bermain d satu wahana aja. Bayar 25rb. Pokok nya dijamin puas klo kesini. Bisa nyewa kostum jepang,naik perahu naga,naik sepda air.
english_translation: Snacking on the boat... there are many rides here. Entrance fee is 30,000 per person. To enter the children's play area and experience all rides, it costs 98,000. Includes playground, flying fox, mini train, becak (pedicab). If you only want to play on one ride, it costs 25,000. You are guaranteed to be satisfied if you come here. You can rent Japanese costumes, ride the dragon boat, and ride the paddle boat.
summary: This tourist attraction features a general admission fee, with options to either pay per ride or purchase an all-inclusive pass for the children's play area. Facilities include a playground and Japanese costume rentals. Activities range from land-based rides like a flying fox and mini train to water activities such as dragon and paddle boat rides.

text: Tempatnya sejuk. Bisa foto-foto sepuasnya disini. Bisa petik sayur sendiri, kalau mau dibawa pulang tinggal ditimbang hasil kita petik lalu bayar. Pelayanan ramah. Kamera hp boleh masuk, tp untuk kamera DSLR ada biaya tambahan sebesar 50ribu.
english_translation: The place is cool. You can take as many photos as you want here. You can pick your own vegetables, and if you want to take them home, you just weigh your harvest and pay. The service is friendly. Phone cameras are allowed, but there's an additional charge of fifty thousand for DSLR cameras.
summary: This attraction offers activities such as vegetable picking, with an option to purchase the harvest, and photography. The venue provides friendly service and has a policy that permits phone cameras but requires an additional fee for DSLR cameras.

text: Htm 30k/orang & parkir motor 5k. Tiket bs ditukar dgn free drinks. Banyak sekali penjual makanan di pasar apungnya, banyak spot untuk foto, udara sejuk walaupun ramai, toilet dan mushola dimana2 tersedia, banyak arena untuk bermain juga, sangat cocok untuk keluarga.
english_translation: Entrance fee 30k/person & motorcycle parking 5k. Tickets can be exchanged for free drinks. Lots of food vendors at the floating market, many photo spots, cool air even though it's crowded, toilets and prayer rooms available everywhere, many play areas too, very suitable for families.
summary: This family-friendly attraction requires an entrance fee, which includes a complimentary drink, and a separate parking fee. The site is well-equipped with numerous food vendors, play areas, and photo spots, along with readily available restrooms and prayer rooms.

text: Kebiasaan kesini tuh trail run lewat sukawana trs dah lama banget g jalur wisata.. Jadi kerasa mahalnya pas masuk.. Biasanya mah gratis.. Fasilitasnya lebih komplit but why ke kawah upas ditutup n harus pake guide yg seharga 100 ribu.. Yaaa aga sedih ajaa haha.. Banyak calo calo yang kaya gitu
english_translation: My habit of coming here is trail running through Sukawana, and it's been a long time since I've been on the tourist trail. So it feels expensive when you enter. It used to be free. The facilities are more complete, but why is Kawah Upas closed and requires a guide costing 100 thousand? Yeah, it's a bit sad, haha. Lots of touts like that.
summary: The attraction now has more complete facilities but charges an entrance fee. Access to the Kawah Upas area is restricted, requiring visitors to hire a guide for an additional cost. Trail running is a mentioned activity at the site.

text: Cara yang sangat buruk jika pergi dengan sepeda motor karena jalanannya penuh batu. tapi itu membayar lebih jika datang dan melihat betapa indahnya tempat ini. Anda bisa berkeliling hutan, camping ground juga melihat air terjun. Jika Anda pergi bersama keluarga, arena ini adalah zona nyaman untuk anak-anak.
english_translation: A very bad way to go by motorcycle because the roads are full of rocks. But it pays off more if you come and see how beautiful this place is. You can go around the forest, camping grounds, and see the waterfall. If you go with family, this area is a comfort zone for children.
summary: While access by motorcycle is difficult due to rocky roads, this family-friendly destination offers camping grounds, a forest to explore, and a waterfall.

text: Tempat bagus tapi kebersihan nya kurang tempat sampah dan kamar mandinya kurang ok
english_translation: Nice place but the cleanliness is lacking, the trash cans and bathrooms are not very good.
summary: The attraction is described as pleasant, but its facilities, particularly the bathrooms and trash cans, are poorly maintained and unclean.

text: setiap ke Bandung selalu menyempatkan diri datang kesini, view nya sangat indah dan pengelolaannya selalu ada peningkatan.
english_translation: Every time I come to Bandung, I always make time to come here. The view is very beautiful and the management is always improving.
summary: This well-managed attraction is a favored destination for repeat visitors, offering beautiful scenery and continuously improving facilities.

text:
Hawa sejuk khas lembang, permainan outbound anak yg cukup banyak dan seru, resort yang sepertinya harus dicoba nih.

Waktu itu datang tanpa menginap hanya PP
english_translation:
Cool Lembang air, quite a lot of fun outbound games for kids, a resort that seems like it must be tried.

At that time, I came without staying overnight, just a round trip.
summary: This resort offers a variety of outdoor games for children and is accessible for day-trip visitors, as an overnight stay is not required.

text: Sekarang ada wahana baru rainbow slide, tiket masuk 30rb/org bisa ditukar dengan minuman dingin dan Kopi segelas. Kalo mau makan harus tuker dengan koin dan ditambah pajak. Banyak pilihan jajanan ringan sampai berat. Tempat ini cocok buat bawa keluarga dan anak2..
english_translation: Now there's a new rainbow slide ride. The entrance ticket is Rp 30,000 per person and can be exchanged for a cold drink and a glass of coffee. If you want to eat, you have to exchange it with coins and add tax. There are many choices of snacks, from light to heavy. This place is suitable for bringing family and children.
summary: This family-friendly attraction features a new rainbow slide and offers a wide variety of food options. The Rp 30,000 entrance fee includes a complimentary drink, while food purchases require a separate coin exchange system.

text: Ga perlu trekking buat liat kawah. Wisata keluarga bgt, bayar masuknya lumayan mahal. Kalo bisa berangkat pagi, sebelum kabutnya turun. Kalo mau foto kliatan perahunya, pake mode panorama. Ga boleh turun k kawah, beda sama ijen yg boleh turun k bawah. Tapi klo dibandingkan dg ijen masih bagus kawah ijen, hehe...
english_translation: No need for trekking to see the crater. Very family-friendly tourism, the entrance fee is quite expensive. If possible, leave early, before the fog descends. If you want to photograph the boat clearly, use panorama mode. You can't go down into the crater, unlike Ijen where you can go down. But compared to Ijen, Ijen crater is still better, hehe...
summary: This family-friendly attraction provides easy crater access without trekking, though descending into it is prohibited. The site has a high entrance fee, and visitors are advised to arrive early to avoid fog for better photography and viewing opportunities.

text: Tempat yang indah, cocok untuk yang lagi liburan.saya berharap suatu saat bisa kembali lagi berkunjung ke tempat ini.
english_translation: A beautiful place, perfect for those on vacation. I hope to visit this place again someday.
summary: The review describes the location as beautiful and ideal for a vacation but provides no specific information about its accessibility, facilities, or activities.

text:
Datang dipenghujung liburan sekolah ternyata masih rame tapi masih wajar,tidak terlalu padat..banyak spot2 untuk berfoto tapi lebih suka nyobain makan sate ayam dan sate kelinci dari pasar apungnya, tentunya dengan cara tuker koin untuk transaksinya.

Satenya lezat bumbunnya..harganya masih bisa ditoleransi lah.
english_translation:
Arriving at the end of the school holidays, it was still crowded but still reasonable, not too packed. There were many spots for photos, but I preferred trying the chicken satay and rabbit satay from the floating market, of course, by exchanging coins for the transactions.

The satay was delicious, the sauce was... the price was still tolerable.
summary: The attraction offers manageable crowds and photo opportunities, featuring a floating market where a special coin system is used to purchase food like the delicious and affordably priced satay.

text: Anak tangganya cukup tinggi, kalo musim hujan licin, banyak monyet, dibawah ada kantin & mushola
english_translation: The stairs are quite high, they're slippery during the rainy season, there are many monkeys, and below there's a canteen and a prayer room.
summary: The attraction is accessed via high stairs that can be slippery when wet, and features on-site facilities such as a canteen and a prayer room at its base. Visitors should also be aware of the presence of many monkeys.

text:
Tempat hiking yang nyaman, sejuk, angin segar, pepohonan besar..
Track jalan yg nyaman menanjak..
Banyak warung tempat istirahat dan makan..
Pengalaman yg menyenangkan.. 🤩🤩🤩 …
english_translation:
A comfortable, cool hiking spot with fresh air and large trees.
The path is comfortable and uphill.
Many stalls for resting and eating.
A pleasant experience. 🤩🤩🤩
summary: This hiking attraction offers a pleasant experience with a comfortable, uphill path through a cool, tree-filled environment. The trail is well-equipped with numerous stalls, providing visitors with places to rest and eat.

text:
Tempatnya oke,
Tiket hanya 10K untuk hiking,20k untuk camping
Curugnya sendiri dr pintu masuk 15menit,
Area campingnya ada bbrpa lokasi.
Sayangnya aksesnya ke lokasi (dari dsn bambu ) sangat kurang bersahabat jalannya (rusaaaaak paraaaah)
english_translation:
The place is okay.
Tickets are only 10K for hiking, 20K for camping.
The waterfall itself is 15 minutes from the entrance.
There are several locations for the camping area.
Unfortunately, the access to the location (from Dusun Bambu) is very unfriendly, the road is (terribly broken).
summary: This attraction offers affordable hiking and camping, with multiple camping areas and a waterfall located a short 15-minute walk from the entrance. However, the access road to the site is in very poor condition, presenting a significant challenge for visitors.

text: Tempatnya bagus banget, menampilkan suasana bali terutama ornamen benteng pintu masuk dan beberapa patung bali. Danau buatan dengan ciri khas romantisnya. kemudian kita bisa sewa sepeda, beca kecil, dan ada foodcort untuk ngopi dan makan. cocok sekali bawa pasangan dan keluarga ketempat ini. view nya luar biasa.
english_translation: The place is really great, it showcases a Balinese atmosphere, especially with the entrance gate ornaments and some Balinese statues. It has a man-made lake with its romantic characteristics. Then we can rent bicycles, small tricycles, and there's a food court for coffee and food. It's very suitable to bring a partner and family to this place. The view is amazing.
summary: This Balinese-themed attraction features a scenic, man-made lake and is well-suited for partners and families. Activities include renting bicycles and tricycles, while on-site facilities feature a food court offering coffee and meals.

text: Tempatnya menarik buat dikunjungi, apalagi bareng pacar sambil menikmari sunrise. Hati-hati terhadap barang karena banyak monyet berkeliaran. Jalan masuk dan tempat parkir perlu dibenahi lagi sehingga jadi tempat wisata yang benar2 layak.
english_translation: The place is interesting to visit, especially with a boyfriend/girlfriend while enjoying the sunrise. Be careful with your belongings as there are many monkeys roaming around. The entrance and parking area need to be improved to make it a truly worthwhile tourist spot.
summary: This attraction offers enjoyable sunrise viewing, but visitors should be cautious with their belongings due to numerous roaming monkeys. The site's accessibility and facilities, specifically the entrance and parking area, require improvement.

text: Tempat wisata di lereng Gunung Putri Lembang, ketinggian di atas 1000 mdpl, sore kesini sejuk banget.. banyak spot foto instagramable pokoknya wajib ke sini kalau main ke Lembang selain floating market dan zoo
english_translation: Tourist attractions on the slopes of Mount Putri Lembang, at an altitude above 1000 meters above sea level. It's very cool to come here in the afternoon. There are many Instagrammable photo spots, so it's a must-visit if you're going to Lembang besides Floating Market and the Zoo.
summary: Located at a high elevation on Mount Putri Lembang, this attraction offers a cool climate and numerous scenic spots, making photography its primary activity.

text:
Serunya klo ke stone garden itu back packer aja...klo saya karna dari Cibaduyut pergi k stasiun Bandung naik angkot,d sambung naik kereta sampai stasiun Padalarang dan naik angkot lagi k stone garden sekitar 20menit....
Daannn nikmatin dech hiking si stone garden.....selamat mencobaaa...🤗💪💪 …
english_translation:
It's exciting to go to Stone Garden as a backpacker... As for me, since I'm from Cibaduyut, I take an angkot to Bandung station, then take a train to Padalarang station, and then take another angkot to Stone Garden, which takes about 20 minutes....
And then, enjoy hiking at Stone Garden..... Happy trying...🤗💪💪 …
summary: Stone Garden is accessible via public transportation, which includes taking a train to Padalarang station followed by an approximately 20-minute angkot ride. The primary activity mentioned at the location is hiking.

text: Nice place to visit kalau ke Bandung. Banyak cafe-cafe Instagram-worthy juga di dalemnya, kayak 450 Degree Pizza, Golden Pine, dsb. Banyak juga spot foto dan aktivitas (wahana?) seperti Kebun Anggrek, Wood Bridge, Flying Fox. Harga tiket masuk Rp 50rb per orang belum termasuk parkir
english_translation: Nice place to visit if you're going to Bandung. Lots of Instagram-worthy cafes inside too, like 450 Degree Pizza, Golden Pine, etc. Many photo spots and activities (rides?) like the Orchid Garden, Wood Bridge, Flying Fox. Entrance ticket price is Rp 50k per person, excluding parking.
summary: This Bandung attraction charges a Rp 50,000 entrance fee per person, excluding parking. On-site facilities include several Instagram-worthy cafes, and visitors can enjoy activities such as an Orchid Garden, a Wood Bridge, a Flying Fox, and numerous photo opportunities.

text:
Tempat liburan bwt keluarga yg keren bgt! Apalagi klo bw anak2 sambil maen jg mengenalkan alam dgn cara yg menarik & santai
Rute dari pintu utama jalannya bener2 enak lancar sejuk pula
Pas nyampe ke atas lumayan panas n bau belerangnya lmyn nyengat, tp anak2 excited bgt
english_translation:
A really cool holiday spot for families! Especially if you bring children, it's a fun and relaxed way to introduce them to nature.
The path from the main entrance is really pleasant, smooth, and cool.
When you get to the top, it's quite hot and the sulfur smell is quite pungent, but the kids were really excited!
summary: This family-friendly nature attraction features a smooth, easily accessible path. The destination at the top is characterized by high heat and a strong sulfur smell, which provides an exciting experience for children.

text:
Begonia Park is one of the beautiful tourist spots with flowers that grow in the garden. And has a great photo spot.

Buat teman-teman yg sudah lama tinggal di rumah kalau mau refreshing menghirup udara segar bisa ke Taman Begonia.

Because it's a beautiful place - menurutku
english_translation:
Begonia Park is one of the beautiful tourist spots with flowers that grow in the garden. And has a great photo spot.

For friends who have been home for a long time and want to refresh by breathing fresh air, you can go to Begonia Park.

Because it's a beautiful place - in my opinion
summary: Begonia Park provides a refreshing outdoor experience, featuring a beautiful flower garden and dedicated photo spots for visitors.

text: Tempatnya adem, ada banyak spot foto yang bagus dan instagramable, ada banyak saung-saung juga buat neduh. Tempatnya enak buat piknik tapi harus hati-hati kalau bawa makanan karena banyak monyet.
english_translation: The place is cool, there are many good and Instagrammable photo spots, and there are also many gazebos for shade. It's a nice place for a picnic but you have to be careful if you bring food because there are a lot of monkeys.
summary: The attraction offers shaded gazebos and is well-suited for photography and picnicking, but visitors should be cautious with food due to the presence of numerous monkeys.

text: Yang sibuk dengan aktivitas sehari².. dengan bisingnya suara motor dan lalu lalang mobil.. butuh ketenangan dan relaksasi mata dengan yg hijau²... Yuuuk kesini aja... Nyaman loh.. mata dimanjakan dengan yg sejuk.. villa nya juga alami terbuat dr kayu².. pokoknya serba alami..
english_translation: For those busy with daily activities, with the noisy sound of motorcycles and passing cars... needing peace and eye relaxation with greenery... Let's come here... It's comfortable, you know. Your eyes will be pampered with the coolness... The villa is also naturally made of wood... everything is natural.
summary: This attraction offers a tranquil escape from busy urban life, providing a comfortable and serene environment ideal for relaxation. The site features a natural wooden villa and activities centered on enjoying the cool, green surroundings.

text: Seru deh klo udah jalan sama keluarga. Apalagi kalau anak sudah besar nanti, akan jadi pengalaman positif yang akan terrekam di memorinya. Cuma ngga sempet masuk ke Flower Garden, karena saat itu gerimis.
english_translation: It's fun when you go out with family. Especially when the children are older, it will be a positive experience that will be recorded in their memories. I just didn't have time to go into the Flower Garden, because it was drizzling at the time.
summary: This family-friendly attraction is a memorable experience, especially for older children. It features outdoor facilities, such as a Flower Garden, so access to some activities may be impacted by weather conditions.

text:
Masih segar dengan pohon Cemara dan view perkebunan teh, cocok buat keluarga.
Hanya saja sampah masih berserakan.
Dan ada penjaga wana yg meminta tiket tambahan kalo mau ke arah perkebunan, padahal sebelum Curug tilu ada penjaga tiket masuk ke CIC.
english_translation:
Still fresh with pine trees and tea plantation views, suitable for families.
It's just that garbage is still scattered around.
And there's a forest ranger who asks for an additional ticket if you want to go towards the plantation, even though before Curug Tilu there's a ticket seller for CIC.
summary: This family-friendly site offers scenic views of pine forests and a tea plantation, but the experience is diminished by scattered litter. Access to the plantation area is complicated by a confusing ticketing system that requires an unexpected additional fee.

text: jangan datang di musim hujan karena kases ke curug sering di tutup bila sedang musim banjir
english_translation: don't come during the rainy season because access to the waterfall is often closed when there is flooding
summary: Access to the waterfall is often restricted during the rainy season due to flooding.

text: Sejuk berada di area hutan Pinus, malam hari cuaca dingin, sedia payung atau jas hujan karena siang pun bisa turun hujan. Ada wahana seperti skybridge+gratis flying fox, playground anak Orchid castle dan sesuai nama tempatnya di sini banyak tanaman anggrek.
english_translation: It's cool in the Pine forest area; the weather is cold at night. Bring an umbrella or raincoat because it can rain even during the day. There are attractions like a skybridge + free flying fox, the Orchid Castle children's playground, and as the name suggests, there are many orchid plants here.
summary: This tourist attraction, set in a cool pine forest, features numerous orchid displays, a skybridge with a free flying fox, and a dedicated children's playground. Visitors should be prepared for potential rain and cold weather.

text: Kalau ingin foto dengan Patung Liberty, Sphinx, Menara Eiffel, Santorini, dll, bisa disini. Bisa juga naik kuda poni, kereta dll. Tiket 50,000 utk yang biasa dan 65,000 (bisa ke jembatan). Dapat free 1 drink. Lebih baik datang pagi supaya enak foto2 + ga terlalu panas mataharinya.
english_translation: If you want photos with the Statue of Liberty, Sphinx, Eiffel Tower, Santorini, etc., you can do it here. You can also ride ponies, carriages, etc. Tickets are 50,000 for regular and 65,000 (includes access to the bridge). You get 1 free drink. It's better to come in the morning for good photos + the sun won't be too hot.
summary: This attraction offers photo opportunities with replicas of global landmarks and activities such as pony and carriage rides. Admission includes a complimentary drink, with a higher-priced ticket option available that grants access to an on-site bridge. For the best experience, a morning visit is recommended.

text: Maribaya yg sekarang lain bgt, masuk gak bs bawa makan n minum, harga di kolam air panasnya mulai 90rb per orang
english_translation: Maribaya now is very different, you can't bring food and drinks in, the hot spring pool prices start from 90k per person.
summary: The attraction prohibits bringing in outside food and drinks, and access to its hot spring pool facilities is available for a fee starting at 90k per person.

text:
Bagus banget viewnya buat foto-foto, tapi harus hati-hati karena kadang ada banyak monyet.

Tapi kalau misal disamperin sama monyet, ingat ya harus tenang biar simonyetna gak merasa terancam, dan usahain jangan bawa tas yg terbuka biar gak di ambil sama si monyetna.
english_translation:
The view is great for taking pictures, but you have to be careful because sometimes there are a lot of monkeys.

But if a monkey approaches you, remember to stay calm so the monkey doesn't feel threatened, and try not to bring an open bag so the monkey doesn't take it.
summary: This scenic location offers excellent photo opportunities, but visitors should be cautious of numerous monkeys. It is recommended to remain calm during encounters and keep bags secured to prevent the animals from taking them.

text: Masyaallah bagus, khusus yg kuat naik turun tangga, hati2 ada monyet 👍 …
english_translation: Masyaallah, it's beautiful. Especially for those who are strong enough to climb stairs, be careful, there are monkeys 👍 …
summary: This attraction requires visitors to be physically capable of climbing stairs for access and should be aware that monkeys are present on site.

text: Destinasi wisata baru, tiket bisa ditukar dengan minuman, dapat paspor unik
english_translation: New tourist destination, tickets can be exchanged for drinks, get a unique passport
summary: This new tourist destination's admission includes a complimentary beverage, and visitors receive a unique passport as part of the experience.

text: Hari Minggu 31 Oktober 2021, mampir kesini, HTM weekend 30rb per orang , weekdays 20rb, mobil 35rb, motor 12rb, parkir 5rb. pengunjung sudah ramai, jangan lupa pake masker.berhubung sudah musim hujan, disini beberapa kali turun hujan.
english_translation: Sunday, October 31, 2021, stopped by here. Weekend entrance fee is 30,000 IDR per person, weekdays 20,000 IDR. Car parking is 35,000 IDR, motorcycle 12,000 IDR, general parking 5,000 IDR. The place was already crowded. Don't forget to wear a mask. Since it's already the rainy season, it rained here several times.
summary: The attraction has variable entrance fees, with higher rates on weekends, and provides parking for both cars and motorcycles at different costs. Visitors should anticipate potential crowds and be prepared for rain, especially during the wet season.

text: Seru seruan anak anak. Dari punya anak 1 sampe 2. Dari anak pergi di 2018. 2019.2022. Ga tau kenapa santai aja jalan kesini anak mamak bapak bisa jajan di pinggiran sungai. Tutut sate cuanki gada gada cireng tujuannya.... sisanya anak2 main emak duduk aje santai sambil merkatiin
english_translation: Kids having fun. From having 1 to 2 children. Since the children left in 2018. 2019. 2022. Don't know why, we just casually walked here, mom and dad's kids can snack by the river. Tutut, satay, cuanki, gado-gado, cireng, the goal is... the rest of the time the kids play, mom just sits relaxed while watching them.
summary: This easily accessible attraction offers a relaxing riverside setting ideal for families. While children play, parents can supervise from seating areas and purchase a variety of snacks from nearby food vendors.

text:
Wisatanya luas n bnyk wahananya, cm tiap wahana bayar lg..
Htm 30rb/org, naik perahu motor 25rb/org, sepeda air 30rb/org anak diatas 1th udh kena tiket, ksh makan kelinci 25rb/org, dan msh bnyk lg wahana lain
english_translation:
The attractions are extensive and have many rides, but each ride costs extra.
Entrance fee is 30,000 IDR/person, motorboat ride is 25,000 IDR/person, pedal boat is 30,000 IDR/person, children above 1 year old already need a ticket, feeding rabbits is 25,000 IDR/person, and there are many other attractions.
summary: This attraction requires a general entrance fee for all visitors, including children over one year old. It offers numerous facilities and activities, such as various boat rides and animal feeding, but each of these incurs a separate, additional cost.

text: Banyak spot untuk foto, setelah capek berjalan keliling, floating market menyediakan berbagai macam makanan mo yg berat atau pun sekedar cemilan, jangan lupa tukar koin dulu untuk belanja makanan. Seru banget....capek nya terbayarkan.
english_translation: Lots of spots for photos. After getting tired from walking around, the floating market offers a wide variety of food, whether it's a hearty meal or just snacks. Don't forget to exchange for coins first to buy food. It was very fun... the tiredness was worth it.
summary: This picturesque attraction involves considerable walking and features a floating market with a wide variety of food. Visitors should note that a special coin exchange system is required for all food purchases.
